name: Crisp Red Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 2 apples, cored and cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cabbage, apples, vinegar, and brown sugar in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Mix well. Cover and simmer for about 10 minutes until the cabbage is tender-crisp.
3. Add salt and nutmeg. Mix well.
4. Serve warm.
6 servings/Serving size: 1/2 cup
Exchanges: All dinner menus this week have about 550 calories and include:

1-2 Fat servings
